title: Hana's Cobblemon Pack
description: A Large Cobblemon focused modpack with various cobblemon fakemon addons and many other mods!
body:
Hana's Cobblemon Pack is a modpack made for a small server that has you exploring the world, catching and training your favorite Pokémon, and battling others. Build your dream team, find amazing fakemon from the community, and become the ultimate Pokémon Trainer in an immersive experience!

## ⚙️ Recommended RAM
- 4GB-6GB to run smoothly

## 📝 Credits

Some of the content included in this modpack has been modified for compatibility reasons and requires attribution to be given to the original authors. We're very appreciative of them. Here's a list of those projects:

- [Project Eevolve](https://modrinth.com/datapack/project-eevolve)
- [Extra Eeveelutions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/extra-eeveelutions)
- [Kobellian Form Wooper](https://modrinth.com/datapack/kobellian-form-wooper-cobblemon-addon)
- [Hydro Reanimodel Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hydro-reanimodel-pack)
- [Pokemans Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-pokemans)
- [CavsCobbleMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cavscobblemons)
- [Soul Megas - FREE MEGAS FOR ALL](https://modrinth.com/datapack/soul-megas-free-megas-for-all)
